items.title: Landmark US housing bill becomes law despite Trump protest
items.dek: The president had wanted voter ID legislation passed before the housing law, which aims to reduce costs and increase supply.
items.body: The president had wanted voter ID legislation passed before the housing law, which aims to reduce costs and increase supply.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: South Africa World Cup midfielder Adams dies aged 25
items.dek: South Africa and Mamelodi Sundowns midfielder Jayden Adams dies at the age of 25, just weeks after featuring for his country at the World Cup.
items.body: South Africa and Mamelodi Sundowns midfielder Jayden Adams dies at the age of 25, just weeks after featuring for his country at the World Cup.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: US pays out $3m to victims of mystery Havana Syndrome condition reported by spies
items.dek: US officials and diplomats and their families began reporting a mysterious illness a decade ago.
items.body: US officials and diplomats and their families began reporting a mysterious illness a decade ago.
